overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval village at dusk. The scene features cobblestone streets, timber-framed buildings, and atmospheric torch lighting in a foggy, overcast environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval village courtyard with wooden platforms

events.description: Geralt steps down from wooden platform onto cobblestone ground

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through the village courtyard, descending from a raised wooden platform

notable_agents.action: villager sitting near the building entrance, observing the surroundings

entered.detail: raised wooden deck with steps where Geralt begins
weathered wooden picket fence lining the left side of the path
medieval stone structure with small windows and timber framing
metal fire basket providing warm orange light against the blue dusk
half-timbered building with exposed wooden beams and plaster walls

segments.scene_description: Geralt begins on a wooden platform in a medieval village courtyard at dusk. He descends onto cobblestone ground, passing burning braziers and timber-framed buildings. The atmosphere is moody and overcast with mixed natural and torch lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow village street with timber houses

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the village street, passing wooden fences and houses with lit windows

entered.detail: tall stone watchtower visible in the distance against the grey sky
abandoned wooden wagon with wheels parked near the building

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow cobblestone street lined with wooden fences and timber-framed houses. Warm light glows from windows on the right while a stone tower looms ahead. The wooden platform and braziers fall behind as Geralt progresses deeper into the village.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone tunnel passage with torch lighting

events.description: Geralt enters the stone archway tunnel, moving from open street to enclosed passage
ambient light drops significantly as Geralt moves into the torch-lit tunnel

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the stone tunnel, passing under the archway with swords visible on his back

notable_agents.action: distant figure standing near the tunnel exit, partially silhouetted against the light

entered.detail: large stone arch tunnel entrance with iron portcullis gates
rough-hewn stone walls of the covered passage
burning torches mounted on the tunnel walls casting flickering orange light
metal gate structure visible at the far end of the tunnel

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters a narrow stone tunnel through a large archway. The environment shifts from open street to enclosed passage with rough stone walls illuminated by wall-mounted torches. The iron portcullis at the far end frames the exit as he approaches the tunnel's end.

events.description: Geralt exits the stone tunnel into an open village courtyard
horse and cart come into view in the center of the square

agents.ego_description: Geralt emerging from the tunnel into a village square, approaching a horse-drawn cart

notable_agents.action: horse standing harnessed to a wooden cart, stationary in the square

entered.detail: wooden wagon with a single horse harnessed, parked in the village square
market stall structure with wooden beams and canvas roof
circular stone well or fountain structure in the center of the courtyard

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, Geralt enters a wider village square where natural light returns. A horse-drawn cart stands in the center near a stone well, surrounded by timber buildings. The atmosphere opens up from the confined tunnel to this communal courtyard space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moody medieval village courtyard that narrows into a dimly lit residential street at dusk. It begins with Geralt descending from a wooden platform onto cobblestone ground, passing burning braziers and timber-framed buildings under an overcast sky. As he progresses, the open courtyard recedes and the scene shifts into a narrow passage lined with wooden fences and houses. The lighting transitions from the flickering glow of outdoor braziers to warm light emanating from windows on the right, before the camera finally pushes forward toward a looming stone tower ahead.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a confined, torch-lit stone passage into an open, natural-lit village square. It begins as Geralt passes through a large archway and enters a narrow tunnel, where the environment shifts to enclosed rough stone walls illuminated by flickering wall-mounted torches. As he advances, the camera follows him toward an iron portcullis that frames the exit of the passage. The scene then opens and expands as he emerges from the tunnel, shifting from the dim interior to the wider communal space of a courtyard. Finally, the view reveals a village square featuring a stone well and a horse-drawn cart surrounded by timber-framed buildings under the returning natural light.
